_comment: Universal function-calling schema for mythosforge-video. Hand the matching block to any tool-use LLM. Parameters identical across shapes; only the envelope differs. openai = OpenAI / Bankr LLM Gateway / Surplus / Codex / Cursor. anthropic = Claude Messages API tool-use.

image.description: Optional first-frame image (path or URL) for image-to-video.

image-field.description: Image-input key for a --model not in the built-in map (e.g. image, first_frame_image, start_image).

duration.description: Optional model duration param, integer (sent only if provided; -1 = auto on Seedance).

resolution.description: Optional model resolution param, e.g. 720p (sent only if provided).

model.description: Optional Replicate video model slug override (default bytedance/seedance-2.0).

function.name: mythosforge_video
function.description: Generate a short video from a text prompt (optionally image-to-video from a first frame) via Replicate. Writes the .mp4 to disk and returns its local path. Requires the caller's own REPLICATE_API_TOKEN in the execution environment. Note: video generation can take minutes.

image-field.description: Image-input key for a --model not in the built-in map.

duration.description: Optional model duration param, integer (sent only if provided; -1 = auto on Seedance).

model.description: Optional Replicate video model slug override.

anthropic.name: mythosforge_video
anthropic.description: Generate a short video from a text prompt (optionally image-to-video from a first frame) via Replicate. Writes the .mp4 to disk and returns its local path. Requires the caller's own REPLICATE_API_TOKEN in the execution environment. Note: video generation can take minutes.

image-field.description: Image-input key for a --model not in the built-in map.

duration.description: Optional model duration param, integer (sent only if provided; -1 = auto on Seedance).

model.description: Optional Replicate video model slug override.

invocation.note: When the model emits a tool call with the args above, the host harness maps them to this shell command and runs it (REPLICATE_API_TOKEN must be set in that environment):
invocation.returns: A JSON line: { ok, prompt, image, path, bytes }. Feed `path` back to the model as the tool result.
